We Strvn - [RM] - Rather devious intentions here
We Strvn - [RM] - Really need aim assist this close?
We Strvn - [RM] - Stage HP Bonies? Better put them everywhere!
We Strvn - [RM] - Fortify my mental castle

We Strvn - [RM] - You WILL upgrade to Windows 11

We Strvn - [RM] - It's Spongebob piloting his brain
We Strvn - [RM] - Tempting to just throw you into the crusher
We Strvn - [RM] - Sweeps under the desk

InfiniteCosmos - [RM] - Quick! Hide! Oh wait, the hiding spots are taken...

InfiniteCosmos - [RM] - What's that strange thing in the middle of the hallway... again?
InfiniteCosmos - [RM] - Pits and pits and more pits
InfiniteCosmos - [RM] - Black candle won't save you from this teleport effect...
InfiniteCosmos - [RM] - See how you like being killed by these things!
